recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR FY26 Disclosure on Supply Chain Risks
recommendations.description: By 2026-05-30, file detailed BRSR FY26 disclosure including supply chain risk mitigation plans and margin impact to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential 20-40 bps cost of capital increase.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹50-100 Cr annual cost from increased cost of capital due to SEBI scrutiny

audit_trail.value: Disclosure required on supply chain risks
Critical supply chain risk impacting margins

recommendations.title: Refresh Earnings Call Narrative with ESG Profitability Focus
recommendations.description: Update earnings call script by 2026-04-30 to highlight ESG-linked cost savings and green bond plans, framing ₹26,537 Cr revenue as opportunity to offset ₹1,857.6 Cr margin hit and improve investor sentiment.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improve investor confidence to reduce P/E compression by 5%, protecting ₹1,300 Cr market cap

recommendations.title: Issue ₹3,000 Cr Green Bond for Working Capital
recommendations.description: Raise ₹3,000 Cr through green bonds by 2026-09-30 to refinance working capital and invest in supply chain upgrades, leveraging EU Taxonomy alignment to reduce cost of capital by 30 bps and mitigate ₹1,857.6 Cr margin risk.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹1,857.6 Cr margin loss mitigated; ₹15-25 Cr annual interest savings at 30 bps lower cost
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power issued ₹5,000 Cr green bond with 30-50 bps discount

audit_trail.value: Margin loss from supply chain and market shifts
Green financing reduces cost of capital
₹5,000 Cr green bond issued with valuation rerating

recommendations.title: Conduct Investor Q&A Prep on Margin and Outlook
recommendations.description: Prepare detailed investor Q&A by 2026-05-15 addressing ₹1,857.6 Cr margin impact and supply chain challenges to maintain investor confidence and reduce P/E compression risk of 5-10%.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigate ₹1,300-2,600 Cr market cap loss from P/E multiple compression

audit_trail.value: Disclosure reduces FII outflow and P/E compression

recommendations.title: Implement Supply Chain Monitoring Dashboard
recommendations.description: By 2026-06-30, deploy real-time dashboard to monitor critical SKU fill rates and logistics uptime; escalate to ACT if fill rate <90% for 5+ days or uptime <99.5% to prevent margin erosion.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹500-800 Cr margin loss from stockouts and SLA breaches

audit_trail.value: Critical supply chain risk impacting margins

immediate_high.title: Issue ₹3,000 Cr Green Bond for Working Capital
